findings.signature: function init(database: Database.Database, vectorFn, graphFn): void
findings.notes: Binds better-sqlite3 Database handle; driver type import is the primary coupling surface for all hybrid search SQL.

findings.signature: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='memory_fts'
findings.notes: Queries sqlite_master for FTS5 virtual table existence; Turso lacks FTS5 so this check would always return false.

findings.signature: SELECT id, spec_folder, importance_tier FROM memory_index WHERE id IN (?)
findings.notes: Standard SELECT on memory_index for BM25 scope resolution; standard SQL, Turso-compatible.

findings.signature: fts5Bm25Search(db, query, { limit, specFolder, includeArchived }) — uses bm25(memory_fts, 10.0, 5.0, 2.0, 1.0)
findings.notes: Delegates to FTS5 bm25() weighted scoring; Turso has no FTS5 — entire FTS channel must be reimplemented.

findings.signature: SELECT m.* FROM memory_index m JOIN active_memory_projection p ... WHERE LOWER(m.trigger_phrases) LIKE ?
findings.notes: LIKE-based trigger phrase search with JOIN to active_memory_projection; standard SQL, Turso-compatible.

findings.signature: SELECT id, title, file_path, importance_tier, importance_weight, spec_folder FROM memory_index ORDER BY CASE importance_tier ...
findings.notes: Pure SQL CASE expression for tier ordering; standard SQL, Turso-compatible.

findings.signature: SELECT rowid, embedding FROM vec_memories WHERE rowid IN (?)
findings.notes: Direct query on sqlite-vec virtual table for MMR reranking embeddings; Turso lacks vec0/loadExtension — must be replaced.

findings.signature: SELECT payload_hash, response_payload FROM memory_idempotency_receipts WHERE receipt_key = ?
INSERT INTO memory_idempotency_receipts (...) VALUES (...) ON CONFLICT(receipt_key) DO UPDATE SET ...
findings.notes: UPSERT with ON CONFLICT and datetime('now'); Turso supports upsert syntax — compatible.

findings.signature: SELECT updated_at, last_dedup_checked_at FROM memory_index WHERE id = ?
UPDATE memory_index SET near_duplicate_of = ?, last_dedup_checked_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?
findings.notes: UPDATE with datetime('now') on memory_index; Turso-compatible.

findings.signature: UPDATE memory_index SET near_duplicate_of = NULL, last_dedup_checked_at = NULL WHERE id = ?
function to_embedding_buffer(embedding: EmbeddingInput): Buffer — Float32Array to binary for sqlite-vec
findings.notes: Converts embeddings to binary format for sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table storage; Turso lacks vec0/loadExtension.
Pure in-memory scoring algorithm on already-retrieved results; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
Pure string normalization pipeline; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
Pure markdown chunking logic; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.

findings.signature: no direct SQLite/driver coupling; StatediffTargetType names are table references
findings.notes: Reconciliation engine is driver-agnostic; StatediffTargetType enum references table names (memory_index, embedding_cache, fts, bm25) but module itself has no SQL — migration-neutral.
Uses better-sqlite3 prepare() to verify handle is closed; Turso driver must support equivalent probe or be shimmed.
Pure filesystem path resolution for DB directory; no SQLite constructs — migration-neutral.
